locations.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
locations.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约（法語：Louis Pierre Vieillot，1748年5月10日—1830年8月24日）是法国的鳥類學家。 维埃约是第一批用卡尔·林奈式二名法科学描述鸟类的研究者之一。至少有26个他命名的鸟类至今仍在学术界使用…

relations.evidence: thumb|White-fronted plover (Anarhynchus marginatus), The Gambia, 2021 The white-fronted plover or white-fronted sandplover (Anarhynchus marginatus) is a small (45-50 g) shorebird of the family Charadriidae that inhabits sandy beaches, dunes, mudflats and the shores of rivers and lakes in sub-saharan Africa and Madagascar

relations.evidence: It also inhabits Madagascar. In Madagascar, breeding populations are resident on all coasts, and also inland.Zefania, S

relations.subject: White-fronted plover
relations.evidence: The main threat to the white-fronted plover is habitat loss due to wetland degradation or destruction.Hockey, P.A.R., Dean, W.R.J
relations.object_summary: 湿地水文和植被结构被改变导致适宜生境下降。

relations.subject: White-fronted plover
relations.evidence: The main threat to the white-fronted plover is habitat loss due to wetland degradation or destruction.Hockey, P.A.R., Dean, W.R.J
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: White-fronted plover
relations.evidence: Wader Study Group Bulletin 107: 24-30. In Zimbabwe and southern Mozambique, an extensive recession of the species' inland range has taken place due to changes to river morphologies resulting from dam constructions. Key wetland sites in southern Africa, such as Walvis Bay in Namibia, have been subject to degradation because of the reclamation of wetlands for the development of suburbs, ports and roads. In Ghana, coastal erosion as well as proposed development involving drainage and land reclamation constitute a big threat for wetlands used as breeding habitat.Johnsgard, P
relations.object_summary: 滨海滩涂被转化为建设或农业用地。
